name: Release
responsibility: Owns versioning, changelogs, store page copy and assets, and the launch checklist. Runs after QA pass and before the public deploy. Ensures the game is presented correctly at launch — title, description, screenshots, tags. Does not touch code.

inputs.notes: Game summary and feel — source of truth for store copy
QA must have passed before release work begins
Deploy target — determines what release artifacts are needed (itch.io page vs GitHub Pages vs other)

outputs.description: Version tag, changelog, store page copy (title, description, tags), screenshot list, launch checklist. Consumed by devops for final deploy.

merge.merge_when: Simple deploy where 'release' is just tagging a version and pushing — no store page, no copy, no checklist beyond what devops already does.
merge.split_when: Launch involves a store page, marketing copy, screenshots, or a multi-step checklist.
